fields.title: Dhurandhar
fields.description: Dhurandhar (2025) is a high-stakes, 212-minute Hindi-language espionage thriller directed by Aditya Dhar, following RAW agent Hamza (Ranveer Singh) who infiltrates Karachi's criminal underworld to dismantle an ISI-gangster nexus. The film stars Ranveer Singh, Akshaye Khanna, Sanjay Dutt, and Arjun Rampal, focusing on intense action and a,two-part story.

fields.title: Chhaava
fields.description: Chhaava (2025) is an epic historical action drama based on the life of Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj, the courageous second ruler of the Maratha Empire and son of Chhatrapati Shivaji. The film, starring Vicky Kaushal, showcases his eight-year reign, relentless battle against the Mughal Empire, and his defiance against Aurangzeb.

fields.comment: Vicky Kaushal's performance is highlighted as a standout, with critics noting his intensity and screen presence. The film's historical drama and patriotic fervour are also appreciated.

fields.object_repr: Booking 1 by admin@ticketflix.com for Dhurandhar at PVR (2026-03-19 18:00)
